allowed_claims: The system executes candidate-profile retrieval over a real anonymized recruitment corpus
PostgreSQL native lexical retrieval, pgvector dense retrieval, and RRF hybrid retrieval can be compared on the same recruitment-domain corpus
Human-reviewed qrels can support bounded offline ranking evaluation
The embedding chunking strategy is appropriate for the profile token-length distribution
forbidden_claims: The system improves recruiter satisfaction in production
The system predicts interview or hiring success
The system has been validated for fairness or bias
